Story: As a new user I want to register with email/password so that I can create an account
As a new user I want to register with Google OAuth so that I can quickly create an account
As a returning user I want to login with email/password so that I can access my spaces
As a returning user I want to login with Google OAuth so that I can quickly access my account
As a logged-in user I want to logout so that I can secure my account
As a user I want my session to persist so that I don't have to login repeatedly
As a user I want to see all my spaces in a dashboard so that I can navigate to them
As a user I want to create a new space via modal so that I can organize my content
As a user I want to quick-create a space from sidebar so that I can rapidly add spaces
As a user I want to rename a space via context menu so that I can update its name
As a user I want to delete a space so that I can remove unused content
As a user I want to share a space with collaborators so that we can work together
As a user I want to click a space card to enter it so that I can view its contents
As a user I want to see all nodes in a space so that I can navigate my content
As a user I want to create a new node via modal so that I can add content
As a user I want to create a context so that I can group related content
As a user I want to edit a node's title so that I can update its name
As a user I want to edit a node's content with blocks so that I can add rich content
As a user I want to delete a node so that I can remove unwanted content
As a user I want to rename a node via context menu so that I can update its name
As a user I want to click a node card to open the editor so that I can view/edit content
As a user I want to add content blocks using slash commands so that I can structure my content
As a user I want to edit block content inline so that I can modify my content
As a user I want to delete a block so that I can remove unwanted content
As a user I want to drag and drop blocks so that I can reorganize my content
As a user I want my changes to auto-save so that I don't lose my work
As a user I want to add heading blocks so that I can create document structure
As a user I want to add bullet/numbered lists so that I can organize items
As a user I want to add code blocks with syntax highlighting so that I can document code
As a user I want to add images so that I can include visual content
As a user I want to add quote blocks so that I can highlight important text
As a user I want to add dividers so that I can separate content sections
As a user I want to add callout blocks so that I can highlight information
As a user I want to add math equations so that I can include formulas
As a user I want to add Mermaid diagrams so that I can create flowcharts
As a user I want to see breadcrumb navigation so that I know my current location
As a user I want a back button so that I can return to previous pages
As a user I want a home button so that I can return to the spaces dashboard
As a user I want a sidebar with tree navigation so that I can see content hierarchy
As a user I want to toggle sidebar visibility so that I can maximize content area
As a user I want to open multiple tabs so that I can work on multiple items
As a user I want to open items in new tabs so that I can keep context
As a user I want to search across all content so that I can find specific items
As a user I want to filter search by type so that I can narrow results
As a user I want to see search results with paths so that I can identify items
As a user I want to click search results to navigate so that I can access found items
As a user I want to share via modal so that I can invite collaborators
As a user I want to invite by email so that I can add team members
As a user I want to set permissions so that I can control access levels
As a user I want to see current collaborators so that I know who has access
As a user I want to remove collaborators so that I can revoke access
As a user I want to copy share link so that I can share via other channels
As a user I want to view the whiteboard canvas so that I can see visual content
As a user I want to draw on the canvas so that I can create diagrams
As a user I want to add shapes so that I can create structured visuals
As a user I want to add text elements so that I can label diagrams
As a user I want to link elements to nodes so that I can connect visual and text content
As a user I want whiteboard to sync with node hierarchy so that visuals stay current
As a user I want whiteboard to auto-save so that I don't lose my work
As a user I want to open items in new tab via context menu so that I can multitask
As a user I want to rename via context menu so that I can quickly update names
As a user I want to duplicate via context menu so that I can copy items
As a user I want to delete via context menu so that I can quickly remove items
As a user I want to share via context menu so that I can quickly share items
As a user I want to view keyboard shortcuts so that I can work efficiently
As a user I want to send feedback so that I can report issues
As a user I want to access help center so that I can learn how to use the app
As a user I want to view my profile so that I can see my account info
As a user I want to logout from profile menu so that I can sign out
As a user I want to see a warning when deleting nodes with children so that I can avoid accidental data loss
As a user I want to delete a node and all its children so that I can clean up entire branches
As a user I want to delete a node and keep its children so that I can restructure without losing content
As a user I want to be warned about duplicate node names so that I can avoid confusion
As a user I want to merge duplicate nodes so that I can consolidate content
As a user I want to add a node to multiple contexts so that I can organize content flexibly
As a user I want to see which contexts a node belongs to so that I understand its relationships
As a user I want to remove a node from a context without deleting it so that I can reorganize
As a user I want to choose relationship types when connecting nodes so that I can express different meanings
As a user I want to see different colors for relationship types in graph view so that I can distinguish them
As a user I want to switch between view modes so that I can focus on different tasks
As a user I want to filter to current context so that I can focus on relevant content
As a user I want to toggle edit controls so that I can avoid accidental changes
As a user I want to mark a context as a template so that I can reuse its structure
As a user I want to see available templates so that I can apply them to new contexts
As a user I want to apply a template to create a new context so that I can start with predefined structure
As a developer I want to create API keys so that I can access the API programmatically
As a developer I want to manage my API keys so that I can control access
As a developer I want a TypeScript SDK so that I can build apps on Mujarrad easily
As an AI agent I want to list and read nodes via MCP so that I can access Mujarrad content
As an AI agent I want to create and update nodes via MCP so that I can manage Mujarrad content
As a user I want whiteboard elements to update when I rename linked nodes so that visuals stay current
As a user I want to create a node from a whiteboard element so that I can connect visual and text content
